snippet.title: MOFA: BBC is not trusted even in the UK
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://news.cgtn.com/news/2021-04-01/MOFA-BBC-is-not-trusted-even-in-the-UK--Z6u03TYwDu/index.html 

According to material openly available, BBC World Service is immune from any form of regulation and can produce all the disinformation it likes with legal impunity in the UK. It has caused the spread of the fake news virus not only in the UK but all over the world. BBC should try to do more just and truthful reports to tackle its credibility crisis, Chinese Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Hua Chunying said on Wednesday.

Subscribe to us on YouTube: https://goo.gl/lP12gA
Download our APP on Apple Store (iOS): https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/cctvnews-app/id922456579?l=zh&ls=1&mt=8

snippet.title: Several rescue vehicles seen near Singapore American School | The Straits Times
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE ➤ http://bit.ly/FollowST

A man was found stuck in a drain - with water up to his chest - at a hiking trail along the Bukit Timah Expressway near Mandai Road on Sunday (March 21). https://str.sg/J9gL

He was later pulled out by officers from the Disaster Assistance and Rescue Team using rescue ropes, said the Singapore Civil Defence Force's (SCDF).

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo
DOP - Madhesh Manickam
Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Dop Team - Ilayaraja , Yuvaraj Dakshan ,Sandy Sanyog.


The Route - Jagadish Palanisamy
Creative Director Karthik Srinivas (NOISE AND GRAINS)

snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves !

《乘风破浪的姐姐》是芒果TV推出的女团成长综艺节目，与其他女团选秀不同，该节目召集了30位1990年之前出生的女艺人，并最终选出7位成员组成女团。在第二季节目中，大众评审按照年龄分为30+和30-两大阵营。赛制上也变得更加残酷，初舞台表演要有Vocal（唱）和Dance（跳）两项，两项分开表演且缺一不可。节目焦点从女性的精彩绽放渗透到她们成功背后付出的努力和奋斗，表现出丰富多样化的女性价值观，诠释自信奋斗的“她力量”，让更多女性能从中感受到自我价值的体现。

snippet.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk “Bismillah Cinta” yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu “Hampa Hatiku” (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

“Bismillah Cinta” ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

“Lagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga “Bismillah Cinta” bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,” ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

“Semua orang bisa menyanyikan “Bismillah Cinta” dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan “Bismillah Cinta”, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan “Bismillah Cinta”, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,” kata Lesti. 

“Dalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul “Bismillah Cinta” produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi “Bismillah Cinta” ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series “Bismillah Cinta” yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, “Bismillah Cinta” menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,” jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

“Kolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan “Bismillah Cinta”,” ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

snippet.title: We Moved Across The Country
snippet.description:
You can check out our new live streaming channel here! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiiY0MsUgNihfAZ2ZgC19lg

Hello friends and welcome to another video! So, late last year we decided to take the plunge and move across the country for a fresh start in a new place. After doing some serious decluttering, we packed up our house, grabbed our cat, and hit the road (and vlogged our whole cross-country road trip in our minivan!) It's been a couple of months and we are finally set up enough to dive back into making videos, so here is our moving vlog! Hopefully you guys enjoy it, and thank you for being so patient with us while we figure all of this out. 

Also, sorry about any smudginess of the windshield! It was tough to keep clean on our drive, but I know sometimes it can look gross, so sorry about that! Lol

This video is NOT sponsored!!

You can check out my Instagram here! https://www.instagram.com/safiyany/​

MUSIC
Via AudioNetwork

snippet.title: How will the Suez Canal blockage disrupt global trade? | Inside Story
snippet.description:
Global shipping is in chaos because of a mishap on a major waterway.
The Ever Given container ship became jammed on the Suez Canal in Egypt.
That's created a tailback of other cargo vessels carrying goods in both directions between Asia and Europe.
Egypt says it hopes to be able to dislodge the ship and reopen the canal.

So what will happen if the blockage isn't cleared soon?

snippet.title: 白棉花为何上了“黑名单” | CCTV「焦点访谈」20210327
snippet.description:
本期节目主要内容：近期，H&M、Nike等一些国外品牌公司声称新疆存在“强迫劳动”问题，拒绝使用新疆棉花产品的声明，引起了全球舆论的关注。而前段时间记者接到一些新疆棉企负责人的反映，说去年以来已经签好的棉产品出口订单，突然间全部被取消，企业经营出现了一定问题。除了工人们担心自己会失去工作，就连棉农也开始担心自己种植的棉花会不会受到影响。

《焦点访谈》是以深度报道为主、以舆论监督见长的电视新闻评论性栏目。

snippet.title: 娛樂新聞台｜廖啟智｜不敵胃癌離世 ｜終年67歲 ｜家人於醫院陪伴走最後一程｜抗癌｜陳敏兒
snippet.description:
【娛樂新聞台】廖啟智不敵胃癌離世 終年67歲 家人於醫院陪伴走最後一程

我們所愛嘅智叔廖啟智昨晚3月28日不幸離世終年67歲，太太陳敏兒同埋兩位兒子都喺醫院陪伴佢走最後一程。早前3月23日智叔太太陳敏兒曾經係醫院交待智叔嘅病情，同時希望大家唔好打電話俾佢，俾佢安心靜養。事隔數日之後，就傳來噩耗非常令人婉惜。曾奪兩屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角，演技實力超群，廣受圈中眾人愛戴，謝謝智叔帶俾我們無數嘅精彩演藝作品。

#娛樂新聞台 #廖啟智 #胃癌 #離世 #抗癌 #智叔 #香港演員 #港星

snippet.title: 【完整版】中美高层战略对话现场全记录 U.S.-China Summit in Alaska [Full Version]
snippet.description:
3月18-19日，中共中央政治局委员、中央外事工作委员会办公室主任杨洁篪，国务委员兼外长王毅在安克雷奇同美国国务卿布林肯、总统国家安全事务助理沙利文举行中美高层战略对话。双方共举行了3场会谈。这是美国拜登政府执政以来的中美首次面对面会晤，也是中美元首除夕通话后的首次高层接触。-------【Please subscribe to the SMG Official TV Channel! 欢迎订阅SMG上海电视台官方频道】
★东方卫视《环球交叉点》，上海广播电视台二十年打造的国际新闻优质品牌。
站内热门：
1、【白宫義见】白宫记者团百年来首位华文记者，零距离解读美国政治
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAyEv1wrVt_PRnbIfUo7wT6Xpi8zNOSTK
2、【环球叶问】美女评论员章一叶，从政治学、社会学、传播学等视角，解读国际热点。
shorturl.at/orAFP
3、【砚青吃瓜】美女评论员陈砚青，以国际关系和新闻专业主义，高举吃瓜旗帜，解构国际热点故事
shorturl.at/mnpLP
4、【环球数说】美女评论员娄佳，带你看数字呈现的新闻，还有数字背后的新闻，有点儿意思
shorturl.at/uBD39
5、【东瀛一周蒋】资深媒体人蒋丰，在日本聊日本，“精致”解读日本政治生活
shorturl.at/xMSW0
6、【大咖说】中国顶尖国际关系学者的真知灼见。牛掰是有道理的
shorturl.at/tFL39
7、【交叉点评】追热点、涨知识，看了不后悔
shorturl.at/tER16
8、【环球交叉点】40分钟国际时政深度访谈，顶级水准、干货满满
shorturl.at/mBDVY

snippet.title: 【愚人節特別企劃】2021.04.01《凹嗚狼人殺》黃偉晉、陳零九│邱鋒澤、婁峻碩、賴晏駒、逸祥、雨婷、紀卜心、篠崎泫、薔薔
snippet.description:
逸祥聖經大戰薔薔走宮廟視角+惡靈騎士局
狼隊配置：惡靈騎士+狼王+小狼
神隊配置：預+女+獵+騎
※女巫全程不可以自救
※此板子修改規則：狼王可以自爆帶人。

娛百版惡靈騎士規則：
1.惡靈騎士擁有「一次」反傷技能-在夜晚中被預言家查驗、被女巫下毒，則該神職淘汰。
2.惡靈騎士將永遠不會死於夜晚。
3.若夜晚中女巫與預言家同毒同驗惡靈騎士，則是女巫淘汰(因夜晚順序為女巫在先)。
4.獵人若死於夜晚，開槍到惡靈騎士，將無法帶走惡靈騎士，但若獵人在白天出局則可帶走惡靈騎士。
5.騎士白天驗證惡靈騎士身分，可成功將惡靈騎士淘汰，不會被反傷影響。
6.惡靈騎士不能自爆，不能自刀。
7.遺言比照先前規則，晚上死的只有第一晚淘汰者的有遺言。

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: England 2-1 Poland | Maguire Volleys In Late Winner! | World Cup 2022 Qualifiers | Highlights
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Delivery courier in China goes to work with baby girl in tow
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

A courier in eastern China’s Jiangsu province was filmed delivering food with his two-year-old daughter in tow. The baby girl was placed in a delivery box while the father rode across the city. He shared his daily life videos online, which caused a sensation on Chinese social media.

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. — https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. — https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster — https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. — https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. — https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon — https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. — https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. — https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. — https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. — https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. — https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton — https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

snippet.title: Stranded cargo ship in Suez Canal could 'take weeks' to free | DW News
snippet.description:
Japanese media are reporting that the owner of a huge container ship blocking Egypt's Suez canal aims to free it by Saturday. But experts are warning it could take weeks. More than a hundred and fifty ships are waiting to get in to what is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with hundreds more headed its way. A prolonged suspension of traffic in the Suez will almost certainly impact global trade, which has already been hit hard by the pandemic. The Suez Canal is a choke-point for world-trade. It connects Asia and Europe and sees 30-percent of the global container-shipping-volume every day.
Dredging teams worked through the night to try to clear the canal bed around the 200,000 ton ship. The stranded Ever Given is holding up around 10 billion dollars in trade every day it is stuck.
Diggers, tugboats, dredgers and a crack team of Dutchmen known as the special forces of salvage operations have been drafted in to help. It's thought containers may have to be offloaded to lighten the vessel - though one mistake could spell disaster.
According to maritime historian Sal Mercogliano, "The bow is basically in Asia, the stern's in Africa, and the middle is in the middle of the canal. And what you can't do is take a lot of weight off the ends and put a lot of what they call a 'sagging stress' on the vessel. You could conceivably crack the hull, cause an oil spill. But worse, catastrophically fracture the vessel in half, which would close the canal for months, if not years, to salvage a vessel of that type."
150 ships are caught in the traffic jam. Each passing day piles on the pressure for global trade routes, already struggling with the coronavirus pandemic.
Those involved have warned it could be weeks before the vessel is freed. Bad news for those stuck in the world's longest maritime tailback.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

Listen to the Sky News Daily podcast on the impact of the cargo ship's blockage of the Suez Canal - https://news.sky.com/story/wedged-in-the-suez-how-a-mega-ship-brought-the-canal-to-a-standstill-12261097

snippet.title: 【外交部】外交部记者会罕见开场方式：华春莹还没露面，先放了一段涉疆视频
snippet.description:
3月26日，外交部发言人华春莹主持例行记者会。在例会开始前，华春莹邀请现场中外记者观看了两则视频，这也是外交部例行记者会现场首次播放视频。 -------【Please subscribe to the SMG Official TV Channel! 欢迎订阅SMG上海电视台官方频道】
★东方卫视《环球交叉点》，上海广播电视台二十年打造的国际新闻优质品牌。
站内热门：
1、【白宫義见】白宫记者团百年来首位华文记者，零距离解读美国政治
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAyEv1wrVt_PRnbIfUo7wT6Xpi8zNOSTK
2、【环球叶问】美女评论员章一叶，从政治学、社会学、传播学等视角，解读国际热点。
shorturl.at/orAFP
3、【砚青吃瓜】美女评论员陈砚青，以国际关系和新闻专业主义，高举吃瓜旗帜，解构国际热点故事
shorturl.at/mnpLP
4、【环球数说】美女评论员娄佳，带你看数字呈现的新闻，还有数字背后的新闻，有点儿意思
shorturl.at/uBD39
5、【东瀛一周蒋】资深媒体人蒋丰，在日本聊日本，“精致”解读日本政治生活
shorturl.at/xMSW0
6、【大咖说】中国顶尖国际关系学者的真知灼见。牛掰是有道理的
shorturl.at/tFL39
7、【交叉点评】追热点、涨知识，看了不后悔
shorturl.at/tER16
8、【环球交叉点】40分钟国际时政深度访谈，顶级水准、干货满满
shorturl.at/mBDVY
优质拍档：
【ShanghaiEye魔都眼】
The most interesting things you need to know about Shanghai and China
shorturl.at/mpv04
官方网站：
看看新闻网：http://www.kankanews.com
ShanghaiEye (ENG): http://www.shanghaieye.com.cn
您还可以在下面这些地方找到我们：
微信公众号：环球交叉点 (smgcrossover)
微信视频号：环球交叉点
头条号：Knews环球交叉点、Knews交叉点评

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

snippet.title: G.E.M.鄧紫棋【超能力 Superpower】Official Music Video
snippet.description:
新歌來了，愚人節快樂🤓

你曾否被騙然後感覺忿忿不平？

你曾否驚嘆原來有人撒謊的能力強到不可思議？

G.E.M.鄧紫棋最新作品〈超能力〉以超能力比喻不留破綻的撒謊能力。雖然在看穿謊言後會「心碎成煙花」， 但就如歌詞說的一樣「那讓我苦中作樂吧」，換個角度， 把這些荒謬的事情當成一場幽默的喜劇， 舉起雙手使出招式一起“代替月亮消滅你”。鄧紫棋想透過這首歌曲傳達即使生活裡可能會遇到很多讓你傷心或憤怒的事情， 但我們還是可以把一切視作笑話， 如同鄧紫棋在歌曲結尾的笑聲一樣， 一笑置之，繼續好好生活！

〈超能力〉是G.E.M.鄧紫棋首支復古舞曲作品，顛覆大家對鄧紫棋從出道開始的搖滾流行、情歌及近年說唱作品的音樂印象，為大家帶來耳目一新的感覺。鄧紫棋在歌詞和編曲中特意設計了很多玩味的元素，例如副歌歌詞中的「代替月亮消滅你」，靈感來自她小時最愛的動漫《美少女戰士》；編曲上則運用了多種採樣聲效，例如爆炸、遊戲機等，增添歌曲的趣味與層次，希望透過好玩的氛圍，邀請大家笑看風雲。

特別鳴謝MV友情演出：陳偉霆


《超能力》
作曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋
作詞：G.E.M.鄧紫棋

還沒完全離去
也許  是在等個結局
Yeah 但故事再延續  
你演了場 滑稽的喜劇

要忘掉一個人
也許  心裏要帶點怨恨
例如發現你  沒多單純
我卻有多愚蠢

這會不會是你唯一的謊言
不可能  不可能
這只不過是我第一次發現
你的謊  有多漂亮

你是否有超能力  
說謊才能全部都不留痕跡  不可思議
原來你的超能力
瞬間能夠崩塌我所有回憶  我討厭你

Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu 
噢我好想代替月亮消滅你  我討厭你
Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu
噢你的偽裝實在無人能及  天下無敵

Shhhhhh  關閉嘴巴 
就讓假亦真時真亦假
你的笑話  我無法消化
Badaboom  原地爆炸
你炸到我心碎成了煙花
（My God）那讓我苦中作樂吧

這會不會是你唯一的謊言
不可能  不可能
這只不過是我第一次發現
你的謊  有多漂亮

你是否有超能力  
說謊才能全部都不留痕跡  不可思議
原來你的超能力
瞬間能夠崩塌我所有回憶  我討厭你
Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu 
噢我好想代替月亮消滅你  我討厭你
Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu
噢你的偽裝實在無人能及  天下無敵

我從未想過有一天
會感覺不認識你
你神奇得就像世界第八個奇跡

超能力
說謊才能 全部都不留痕跡  不可思議
原來你的超能力
瞬間能夠崩塌我所有回憶  我討厭你

Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu
超能力  超能力
Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu
超能力  超能力

snippet.title: Handling A Dysfunctional Relationship With My Tiger Mum: John Lim | Ask ZULA | EP 7
snippet.description:
In this episode of Ask ZULA, John shares his experience handling family conflicts and managing his mental health. 

Here are the timestamps of the topics covered during the episode:
0:00 - Intro
1:08 - Current family dynamic
7:49 - How it has affected him today
14:45 - Where his mother's behaviour stems from
17:17 - Patching the relationship for the better
19:54 - Managing bad mental health
22:43 - Thoughts on moving out
23:50 - Work-from-home situation
25:31 - Advice for others who may be facing similar family problems
27:15 - Message to his mum

About Ask ZULA:
Ask ZULA is a brand new segment on the channel where we ask people in our office to share their life experiences as well as their perspectives on the talk of the town. 

About ZULA: 
ZULA is a website catered to Singaporean female millennials. We cover lifestyle, perspective and inspirational stories of women in Singapore.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: 习近平在视察武警第二机动总队时强调 全面加强练兵备战 全面提高履行使命任务能力 | CCTV「新闻联播」20210326
snippet.description:
本期节目主要内容：
01:35 习近平在视察武警第二机动总队时强调 全面加强练兵备战 全面提高履行使命任务能力； 
08:29 习近平同喀麦隆总统就中喀建交50周年互致贺电； 
10:30 奋力谱写全面建设社会主义现代化国家福建篇章——习近平总书记在福建考察引起广大干部群众热烈反响； 
17:42 【央视快评】在服务和融入新发展格局上展现更大作为； 
17:51 李克强主持召开经济形势部分地方政府主要负责人视频座谈会；

21:41 全国政协召开网络议政远程协商会 围绕“全民义务植树行动的优化提升”协商议政； 
23:37 新华社通讯：让历史照亮未来——跟着习近平总书记的足迹学习党史；

29:09 按梯次推进 我国加快新冠疫苗接种； 
30:47 国内联播快讯： 
（1）2021年中央本级“三公”经费预算比去年下降6%； 
（2）24项政策措施培育新型消费； 
（3）三部门要求防止经营贷违规流入房地产领域； 
（4）新修订的《医疗器械监督管理条例》6月1日施行； 
（5）黄河流域入河排污口排查整治专项行动启动； 
（6）“双千兆”行动计划发布 三年建成百个千兆城市； 
（7）2021年军队直招军官工作启动； 
（8）“唱支心歌给党听”大型主题合唱活动今天启动； 
（9）市场监管总局责令492户营利性医疗机构更名； 
（10）最高法发布26条举措服务保障北京“两区”建设； 
（11）山海高速正式通车 海南实现“县县通高速”； 
（12）全国铁路4月10日实行新列车运行图； 
35:54 古特雷斯：必须解决种族主义遗毒 中国代表：美国应着力解决自身人权问题； 
38:27 国际联播快讯： 
（1）联合国报告：全球经济遇90年最严重衰退； 
（2）货船仍搁浅 苏伊士运河中止通航。

zh-Hant.title: 習近平在視察武警第二機動總隊時强調 全面加强練兵備戰 全面提高履行使命任務能力 | CCTV「新聞聯播」20210326
zh-Hant.description:
本期節目主要內容：
 01:35 習近平在視察武警第二機動總隊時强調 全面加强練兵備戰 全面提高履行使命任務能力；
08:29 習近平同喀麥隆總統就中喀建交50周年互致賀電；
10:30 奮力譜寫全面建設社會主義現代化國家福建篇章——習近平總書記在福建考察引起廣大幹部群衆熱烈反響；
17:42 【央視快評】在服務和融入新發展格局上展現更大作爲；
17:51 李克强主持召開經濟形勢部分地方政府主要負責人視頻座談會；
19:49 栗戰書同巴西衆議長舉行會談；
21:41 全國政協召開網絡議政遠程協商會 圍繞“全民義務植樹行動的優化提升”協商議政；
23:37 新華社通訊：讓歷史照亮未來——跟着習近平總書記的足跡學習黨史；
23:48 黨史學習教育中央宣講團報告會在新疆生產建設兵團、西藏、青海舉行；
26:12 國家航天局發布天問一號拍攝火星側身影像；
27:13 大型政論專題片《掃黑除惡——爲了國泰民安》今起播出；
29:09 按梯次推進 我國加快新冠疫苗接種；
30:47 國內聯播快訊：
（1）2021年中央本級“三公”經費預算比去年下降6%；
（2）24項政策措施培育新型消費；
（3）三部門要求防止經營貸違規流入房地產領域；
（4）新修訂的《醫療器械監督管理條例》6月1日施行；
（5）黃河流域入河排污口排查整治專項行動啟動；
（6）“雙千兆”行動計劃發布 三年建成百個千兆城市；
（7）2021年軍隊直招軍官工作啟動；
（8）“唱支心歌給黨聽”大型主題合唱活動今天啓動；
（9）市場監管總局責令492戶營利性醫療機構更名；
（10）最高法發布26條舉措服務保障北京“兩區”建設；
（11）山海高速正式通車 海南實現“縣縣通高速”；
（12）全國鐵路4月10日實行新列車運行圖；
35:54 古特雷斯：必須解决種族主義遺毒 中國代表：美國應着力解决自身人權問題；
38:27 國際聯播快訊：
（1）聯合國報告：全球經濟遇90年最嚴重衰退；
（2）貨船仍擱淺 蘇伊士運河中止通航。

snippet.title: Talachabi | তালাচাবি | New Natok 2021 | Afran Nisho | Mehazabien Chowdhury | Bangla Natok 2021
snippet.description:
Talachabi - New Natok 2021 - Tala Chabi Natok/ তালাচাবি নাটক, starring Afran Nisho & Mehazabien Chowdhury in lead roles, directed by Serniabat Shawon.

Talachabi Natok
[A Eagle Music Original Drama]

Story, Script & Directed by: Serniabat Shawon
Tala cabi Cast: Afran Nisho, Mehazabien Chowdhury, Kachi Khondoker, Shilpi sharkar Apu & Iktarul Islam.

তালা চাবি নাটক এর অন্যান্য চরিত্রেঃ আয়ান আহমীর সুজন, রাফায়াতুল্লা সোহান, উদয় খান, তাকবিরুল ইসলাম ও সুমগ্ন সৌরভ
Cinematographer: Zahid Hossain
Title, Edit & Color: Tanvir Tahsan
Background Score: Apple Mahmud Emil
Chief Ad: Rayhan Asad, Hasib Rahman
Ad: Rijuan Alom Akib,rajon Monrai
Costume: Zannatul Nayem
Art Director: Babu Shawpnowala
Art Associate: Nisith Shamim
Make-up: Shafiqur Rahman
Still Photography: Al Shahriar

প্রোডাকশন ডিজাইনঃ রায়হান আসাদ
প্রাথমিক সম্পাদনাঃ মোঃ সাব্বির আহমেদ, সাকিল হোসেন
রূপসজ্জা সহকারীঃ মনোয়ার হোসেন
ক্যামেরা সরবরাহঃ ফাইভ স্টার ক্যামেরা হাইজ
প্রধান সহকারী চিত্রগ্রাহকঃ সজল আহমেদ
সহকারী চিত্রগ্রাহকঃ লতিফুর রহমান, হাসান আলী
শব্দ গ্রহনঃ মোঃ ইমরান
লাইট সরবরাহঃ খলিল লাইট হাউজ
আলোকসজ্জা প্রধানঃ লিয়াকত আলী
আলোকসজ্জা সহকারীঃ জসিম, কায়সার আলী, মোঃ আতিক
ব্যবস্থাপনা প্রধানঃ জুয়েল আহমেদ
ব্যবস্থাপনা সহকারীঃ তানভীর, রাজিব, জিয়া
খাবার সরবরাহঃ হান্নান (উওরা)
গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ আলতাফ হোসেন
পিক-আপঃ জামাল হোসেন
ঘোড়ার গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ সিদ্দিকুর রহমান
তালাচাবির দোকানঃ ইউসুফ আলি
লোকেশনঃ হইচই শুটিং হাউজ ( উত্তরা ), উত্তরা খালপার ( দিয়াবাড়ী )
কারিগরী সহযোগীতাঃ টেলিহোম

তালাচাবি নাটক —
Label: Eagle Music™

Talachabi Drama © 2021 Eagle Music
#TalachabiNatok #Natok2021 #NewNatok2021

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: England 5-0 San Marino | Watkins Debut Goal & DCL Double | World Cup 2022 Qualifiers | Highlights
snippet.description:
The Three Lions got their World Cup 2022 qualification campaign off to an emphatic start with a 5-0 win against San Marino at Wembley Stadium. Goals from Dominic Calvert-Lewin, Raheem Sterling, James Ward-Prowse and Ollie Watkins, making his England debut, gave the Three Lions all three points.

snippet.title: Golden CRAB YOLK!! Greatest Ever SPICY SEAFOOD on The Beach! 🌶 🏖
snippet.description:
🎥 Fried Chili Chicken: https://youtu.be/vgNDu7fJmIA
👕 T-shirts and caps available now: https://migrationology.com/store/

NAKHON SI THAMMARAT - Welcome to Nakhon Si Thammarat, located in Southern Thailand, and one of my favorite provinces in Thailand. It’s home to some of the spiciest, and most flavorful food in all of Thailand, and they have an abundance of delicious seafood. Today we’re taking a day trip to Laem Talumphuk, which is a cape jetting into the ocean just a 45 minute drive from Nakhon Si Thammarat. Get ready to eat some serious Thai seafood!

Cha-Run Seafood (ร้านจ่ารุณ) - Along the cape, you’ll find a number of seafood restaurants, right along the sand. We chose to eat at Cha-Run Seafood (ร้านจ่ารุณ), and I can tell you right away, highly recommended. It was an outstanding meal.

First of all, the owner and all the chefs were incredibly nice and so friendly, and they laughed so hard the entire time we were there about the fan exploding.

We ordered a huge amount of seafood, and southern Thai foods, including clams, a giant alien mantis shrimp the size of my forearm, mullet in sour soup, seawater catfish curry, and not forgetting the golden yellow crab roe. In addition to the seafood, there’s nothing better than sitting with your feet in the sand while you eat.

Total price - 1,520 THB ($49.17)

After lunch, we continued driving down to the end of Laem Talumphuk, mostly just to see the view. It’s quite a unique landscape and nice place to visit, but the seafood is the real reason to visit.

📍 Cha-Run Seafood (ร้านจ่ารุณ): https://goo.gl/maps/sL7kPkfBFuF3r7Mz5

🎵MUSIC: 
https://goo.gl/HwVjdo

——————————————————

🍌100% Real Durian Chips - Order Here: 
http://pixelfy.me/uY4K5z

👕Get t-shirts and caps:
https://migrationology.com/store/

——————————————————

📱FOLLOW:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/migrationology
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/migrationology

Cha-Run Seafood (ร้านจ่ารุณ) - Along the cape, you’ll find a number of seafood restaurants, right along the sand. We chose to eat at Cha-Run Seafood (ร้านจ่ารุณ), and I can tell you right away, highly recommended. It was an outstanding meal.

First of all, the owner and all the chefs were incredibly nice and so friendly, and they laughed so hard the entire time we were there about the fan exploding.

We ordered a huge amount of seafood, and southern Thai foods, including clams, a giant alien mantis shrimp the size of my forearm, mullet in sour soup, seawater catfish curry, and not forgetting the golden yellow crab roe. In addition to the seafood, there’s nothing better than sitting with your feet in the sand while you eat.

Total price - 1,520 THB ($49.17)

After lunch, we continued driving down to the end of Laem Talumphuk, mostly just to see the view. It’s quite a unique landscape and nice place to visit, but the seafood is the real reason to visit.

snippet.title: Suez Canal blocked after huge container ship wedged across it  - BBC News
snippet.description:
A giant container ship the length of four football pitches has become wedged across Egypt's Suez Canal, blocking one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Dozens of vessels are stuck, waiting for rescue boats to free the 400m-long (1,312ft) ship, which was knocked off course by strong winds.

Egypt has reopened the canal's older channel to divert some traffic until the grounded ship can move again.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜競馬Fact Check Live直播2021-03-31 九場HKJC香港賽馬會沙田泥地夜馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬 | 蘋果日報 Apple Daily
snippet.description:
這天（31日）沙田馬場上演九場泥地夜賽，頭場定於傍晚6時45分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

《競馬Fact Check》提供AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，將有出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》設有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於下午6時10分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》都會全程直播。

snippet.title: Stranded Ever Given back afloat in Suez Canal: Reports
snippet.description:
The Ever Given has been “successfully refloated” on the Suez Canal, according to Inchcape Shipping Services, a week after it ran aground in high winds blocking one of the world’s busiest shipping lanes.
“She is being secured at the moment. More information about next steps will follow once they are known,” the company said on Twitter.

Al Jazeera’s Alexi O'Brien reports.

snippet.title: Why you can't compare Covid-19 vaccines
snippet.description:
What a vaccine's "efficacy rate" actually means.

Sign up for our newsletter: http://www.vox.com/video-newsletter

In the US, the first two available Covid-19 vaccines were the ones from Pfizer/BioNTech and Moderna. Both vaccines have very high "efficacy rates," of around 95%. But the third vaccine introduced in the US, from Johnson & Johnson, has a considerably lower efficacy rate: just 66%.

Look at those numbers next to each other, and it's natural to conclude that one of them is considerably worse. Why settle for 66% when you can have 95%? But that isn't the right way to understand a vaccine's efficacy rate, or even to understand what a vaccine does. And public health experts say that if you really want to know which vaccine is the best one, efficacy isn't actually the most important number at all.

Further reading from Vox:

Why comparing Covid-19 vaccine efficacy numbers can be misleading: https://www.vox.com/22311625/covid-19-vaccine-efficacy-johnson-moderna-pfizer

The vaccine metric that matters more than efficacy: https://www.vox.com/22273502/covid-vaccines-pfizer-moderna-johnson-astrazeneca-efficacy-deaths

The limits of what vaccine efficacy numbers can tell us: https://www.vox.com/21575420/oxford-moderna-pfizer-covid-19-vaccine-trial-biontech-astrazeneca-results

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE

snippet.title: A 100 years old Legacy: Famous Eunos Bak Chor Mee - Food Stories
snippet.description:
Bak Chor Mee was founded by Mr Chen Lian Fu in the 1920s, served on a 2-basket-hawker. It has then became a significant meal choice for majority of the Singapore population. Growing up as a descendant of an almost 100 years old hawker trade, Jie Wei abandoned his corporate career to continue the legacy of Mr Chen Lian Fu, serving delicious soup and dry based Bak Chor Mee. Little did we know that most of the soup based Bak Chor Mee was descended from the same ""hero"". 

Address:
Famous Eunos Bak Chor Mee
7 Eunos Cres, Hong Lee Coffee Shop
Singapore 400007

Shot by: Hoo Yi, Priscilla, Shu En
Edited by: Solomon
--
Website: https://sethlui.com/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sethluimarketing
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sethluicious/

#sethlui #foodstories #food #foodies #sgfoodies #eats #famouseunosbakchormee #bakchormee

snippet.title: 【娛樂八卦】Smart Travel廖啟智胃癌病逝｜相戀陳敏兒女尊男卑開始｜細仔血癌｜大仔易服癖｜妻子抑鬱症｜演技爐火純青｜回到未紅時｜多圖｜崎嶇人生積極面對 ｜香港驕傲｜我係本土派｜是日娛樂重點推介
snippet.description:
#娛樂八卦 #SmartTravel #廖啟智 #廖啟智胃癌病逝 #陳敏兒 #女尊男卑 #細仔血癌  #大仔易服癖 #抑鬱症 #演技爐火純青 #回到未紅時 #多圖 #崎嶇人生#積極面對  #香港驕傲 #是日娛樂新聞重點推介 #smarttravelsa姐 #廖啟智十年 #智叔
【娛樂八卦】Smart Travel廖啟智胃癌病逝｜臨終交託田啟文田雞內心痛苦幫完成遺作｜2部遺作執導主演《翻兜人生》｜主演《女人街・再見了》｜吳孟達離世｜陳敏兒積極面對｜多圖｜是日娛樂新聞重點推介
https://youtu.be/1vnjOjbUJ9U

【空姐爆料】系列, 專業人士、家庭主婦、OL、行政人員、男士、傳媒亦喜歡報導我的呢個 #SmartTravel, 可以滿足你 #娛樂、輕鬆、#剝花生 #旅遊資訊 #平吃買玩 #各地文化, 要睇梗係睇原汁原味, 你係咩人就會支持返咩嘅youtuber, 國際華人傳媒, 最喜歡報道Smart Travel #我係本土派
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLhKZNoNE4iEf-Rsl1fa8Um8aY2Yl86Q95
大家可以透過Payme,  支持下我, 打賞打賞鼓勵鼓勵:
https://payme.hsbc/smarttravel

📌合作邀約請洽
gold7778@gmail.com
https://www.instagram.com/gold7778t/

成為這個頻道的會員並獲得獎勵：
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIuNPxqDGG08p3EqCwY0XIg/join

請用片右下角調4K睇片。

....................
資深演員廖啟智（智叔）早前傳出患上胃癌，全面停工，並留院接受治療；日前太太陳敏兒到醫院探望智叔時，透露丈夫樂觀抗癌，醫生更讚他是A+病人。昨晚智叔的經理人公司證實智叔死訊，於二零二一年三月二十八日晚上八時三十二分，於威爾斯親王醫院，安然在家人陪伴下離世。

呢條影片我哋一齊回到未紅時嘅廖啟智 ，佢點樣入行 ，經歷過啲乜嘢 令到佢嘅演技爐火純青 ，呢條影片會有好多珍貴嘅相片 ，大家睇完影片可以加入討論 ，抒發你哋對了啟智嘅欣賞懷念 ，或者講下你哋喜歡智叔一個作品呀 。



廖啟智和陳敏兒是79年訓練班同學，開學咗3個月就開始拍拖。 , 

我哋先回顧佢嘅事業, 自小在基層家庭長大，因親戚在大東電報局工作，家裏得以用便宜價安裝「麗的映聲」，在粵語長片裏看到童星馮寶寶，啟蒙他要做演員。喺佢22歲那年，廖啟智去了考無線藝員訓練班, 第一次並未有成功，但他沒放棄

隔了第二次，再次報考, 今次他終於得償所願考入第八期無線藝員訓練班,與廖啟智同屆的還有李成昌、周秀蘭、陳敏兒、黃造時、景黛音、湯鎮業等等，唔知大家仲記唔記得佢哋呢。

隨後加入TVB, 1980年，智叔參演《上海灘》出道, 在劇中飾演丁力條靚 陳祥貴，初出茅廬的他同周潤發、呂良偉等一哥對戲的時候多少會有一點壓力，但卻不緊張甚至仲識得隨機應變。

雖然佢嘅演技受到肯定，不過由於佢嘅外型唔算好出眾 ，很多次都是出演一些不起眼的配角，例如在一九八七年出演的《大河運》中飾演楊勇一角。在《最佳女婿》中飾演醫生。

廖啟智與陳敏兒同是79年第8屆無綫藝員訓練班同學。由於陳敏兒外形標緻，發展順利，好快就擔正女主角，更在劉德華成名作《獵鷹》，跟他飾演情侶，外形襯絕。之後她一直受大台力捧，除了做《體育世界》及其他大騷主持，更不斷有劇拍，差不多部部都擔正。

.....................

【空姐爆料】系列, 專業人士、家庭主婦、OL、行政人員、男士、傳媒亦喜歡報導我的呢個 #SmartTravel, 可以滿足你 #娛樂、輕鬆、#剝花生 #旅遊資訊 #平吃買玩 #各地文化, 要睇梗係睇原汁原味, 你係咩人就會支持返咩嘅youtuber, 國際華人傳媒, 最喜歡報道Smart Travel #我係本土派

gold7778@gmail.com
https://www.instagram.com/gold7778t/

成為這個頻道的會員並獲得獎勵：
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIuNPxqDGG08p3EqCwY0XIg/join

請用片右下角調4K睇片。

....................
資深演員廖啟智（智叔）早前傳出患上胃癌，全面停工，並留院接受治療；日前太太陳敏兒到醫院探望智叔時，透露丈夫樂觀抗癌，醫生更讚他是A+病人。昨晚智叔的經理人公司證實智叔死訊，於二零二一年三月二十八日晚上八時三十二分，於威爾斯親王醫院，安然在家人陪伴下離世。

呢條影片我哋一齊回到未紅時嘅廖啟智 ，佢點樣入行 ，經歷過啲乜嘢 令到佢嘅演技爐火純青 ，呢條影片會有好多珍貴嘅相片 ，大家睇完影片可以加入討論 ，抒發你哋對了啟智嘅欣賞懷念 ，或者講下你哋喜歡智叔一個作品呀 。



廖啟智和陳敏兒是79年訓練班同學，開學咗3個月就開始拍拖。 , 

我哋先回顧佢嘅事業, 自小在基層家庭長大，因親戚在大東電報局工作，家裏得以用便宜價安裝「麗的映聲」，在粵語長片裏看到童星馮寶寶，啟蒙他要做演員。喺佢22歲那年，廖啟智去了考無線藝員訓練班, 第一次並未有成功，但他沒放棄

隔了第二次，再次報考, 今次他終於得償所願考入第八期無線藝員訓練班,與廖啟智同屆的還有李成昌、周秀蘭、陳敏兒、黃造時、景黛音、湯鎮業等等，唔知大家仲記唔記得佢哋呢。

隨後加入TVB, 1980年，智叔參演《上海灘》出道, 在劇中飾演丁力條靚 陳祥貴，初出茅廬的他同周潤發、呂良偉等一哥對戲的時候多少會有一點壓力，但卻不緊張甚至仲識得隨機應變。

雖然佢嘅演技受到肯定，不過由於佢嘅外型唔算好出眾 ，很多次都是出演一些不起眼的配角，例如在一九八七年出演的《大河運》中飾演楊勇一角。在《最佳女婿》中飾演醫生。

廖啟智與陳敏兒同是79年第8屆無綫藝員訓練班同學。由於陳敏兒外形標緻，發展順利，好快就擔正女主角，更在劉德華成名作《獵鷹》，跟他飾演情侶，外形襯絕。之後她一直受大台力捧，除了做《體育世界》及其他大騷主持，更不斷有劇拍，差不多部部都擔正。

.....................

About Key & Peele: 
Key & Peele showcases the fearless wit of stars Keegan-Michael Key and Jordan Peele as the duo takes on everything from "Gremlins 2" to systemic racism. With an array of sketches as wide-reaching as they are cringingly accurate, the pair has created a bevy of classic characters, including Wendell, the players of the East/West Bowl and President Obama's Anger Translator.

snippet.title: 【太魯閣號出軌】"忘記拉手剎車"奪50命! 起底肇禍工程行5年19標案削2億 @中天新聞 20210402
snippet.description:
#太魯閣號#工程車#忘記拉手剎

台鐵408次太魯閣號發生出軌重大意外，
初步了解，是一輛工程車不但違規停在斜坡上，還疑似忘記拉手剎車，才會滑下15公尺邊坡。網友在PTT回文指出，查看Google街景，會發現這台吊車的身影，對比在隧道外現場黃色車斗的車牌號碼還有外觀，可以知道車子種類，「車號跟車身相符合，該車為一般常見改裝的懸臂吊車」。另外，根據空勤總隊拍攝的照片，「疑似工程車滑落的痕跡，根據現場照片推論，應該是車頭朝太平洋方向停在鐵軌上。」

【中天新聞24小時直播】 https://youtu.be/5tQBwbyQ-Fw

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5l1Yto5oOIgRXlI4p4VKbw

snippet.title: Cast of Vincenzo opens up about what keeps them going in life | Couch Talk [ENG SUB]
snippet.description:
Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, and Ok Taec-yeon sit down for a chat about what motivates them, and the feelings they shared while getting into character for VINCENZO. No surprise that their dynamic is as fun offscreen as it is on—they even establish themselves as honorary members of The Swoon Fan Club! 🥰

Subscribe to The Swoon: https://bit.ly/2IiIXqV

Follow The Swoon on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theswoonnetflix/

Watch Vincenzo on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81365087


ABOUT THE SWOON

Welcome to The Swoon, your all-access pass behind the scenes of your favorite Korean and Asian dramas. Get up close and personal with the stars. Tell us what you love to watch, what endings made you want to tear your hair out, and what keeps you coming back for more, ever optimistic that the next one will be The One.

For the fans.
Powered by Netflix.
All biases welcome.

*Shows featured might not be available in all markets.

ja.title: 「ヴィンチェンツォ」のキャストが人生について語ります [日本語字幕付き]
ja.description: ソン・ジュンギ、チョン・ヨビンとオク・テギョンが一緒に人生に着いて語ります。人生で何がモチベーションになってるやドラマの役作りの準備の心境はどうだったについても語ります。この3人のケミストリーはオンスクリーンでもオフスクリーンでも抜群だと感じられるトークになります－THE SWOONのファンクラの名誉会員を自分たちに名付けましたよ！🥰

zh-Hans.title: 黑道律師文森佐的主演們探討人生的意義 | 沙發座談【中字 CC】
zh-Hans.description: 宋仲基、全汝彬和玉澤演坐下來分享他們的動力還有進入角色的一些感想。这一点也不惊奇他们荧幕下和荧幕上的团队动力都一样有趣 — 还称自己为Swoon粉丝会的荣誉成员！🥰

th.title: นักแสดงจาก Vincenzo เปิดใจเกี่ยวกับสิ่งที่ทำให้พวกเขาก้าวต่อไปในชีวิต | จับเข่าคุย [ซับไทย CC]
th.description: ซงจุงกิ จอนยอบีน และ อ๊กแทคยอน นั่งคุยกันเกี่ยวกับสิ่งที่กระตุ้นพวกเขาและความรู้สึกที่พวกเขาแบ่งปันในขณะที่มารับบทเป็นตัวละครใน VINCENZO ไม่แปลกใจเลยที่ปฏิสัมพันธ์นอกจอของพวกเขาจะสนุกเหมือนอยู่ในจอ - พวกเขาตั้งตัวเป็นสมาชิกกิตติมศักดิ์ของ แฟนคลับ The Swoon ด้วยซ้ำ! 🥰

es.title: El elenco Vincenzo habla abiertamente sobre qué les hace seguir adelante en la vida | Couch Talk[ES]
es.description: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been y Ok Taec-yeon se sientan a charlar sobre lo que les motiva en la vida y los sentimientos que compartieron al dar vida a los personajes de VINCENZO. No es de extrañar que su dinámica sea tan divertida fuera de la pantalla como dentro de ella: - ¡incluso se han establecido como miembros honorarios de The Swoon Fan Club! 🥰

zh-Hant.title: 黑道律師文森佐的主演們探討人生的意義 | 沙發座談【中字 CC】
zh-Hant.description: 宋仲基、全汝彬和玉澤演坐下來分享他們的動力還有進入角色的一些感想。这一点也不惊奇他们荧幕下和荧幕上的团队动力都一样有趣 — 还称自己为Swoon粉丝会的荣誉成员！🥰

pt.title: O elenco de Vincenzo fala abertamente sobre o que os faz seguir em frente na vida | Couch Talk [PT]
pt.description: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been e Ok Taec-yeon sentam-se para bater um papo sobre o que os motiva na vida e sobre os sentimentos que compartilharam ao dar vida aos personagens de VINCENZO. Não é de se admirar que a dinâmica deles seja tão divertida fora da tela quanto dentro - eles até se instituem como membros honorários do The Swoon Fan Club! 🥰

id.title: Para pemeran Vincenzo menceritakan hal yang membuat mereka terus hidup | Obrolan Santai [INDO SUB]
id.description: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, dan Ok Taec-yeon duduk berbincang tentang apa yang memotivasi mereka, dan apa yang mereka rasakan saat mendalami peran di VINCENZO. Tak heran jika dinamika mereka di balik layar seseru saat di depan layar--mereka bahkan menyatakan kalau mereka adalah anggota terhormat Klub Penggemar The Swoon! 🥰

snippet.title: 這群人 TGOP │懷孕的經典語錄 Classic Pregnancy Quotes
snippet.description:
「不管風吹雨打，不問星期或例假，我的媽媽從來不放假，工作為了家......，」童年的一首歌，道出身為媽媽的辛苦。懷胎10月，媽媽需要面對身體上的不適、即將為人母的不安，以及更多經濟、家庭的責任，因此偶爾難免變得敏感，時而易怒、時而感性，然而這些小情緒卻也為生活帶來不少笑料。這次這群人誇張演繹出三對夫妻的孕期日常，究竟懷孕後的生活，周遭會有什麼變化?面對改變，三位準爸爸媽媽又將如何接招呢XD

snippet.title: 【外交部】马来西亚外长用中文叫王毅“大哥” 华春莹说隔屏幕都感觉到热烈
snippet.description:
4月1日，王毅国务委员兼外长与马来西亚外长希沙姆丁共见记者时，希沙姆丁用中文表示，马来西亚和中国是一家人，王毅国委是我的兄长。现场气氛暖意融融。 对此，外交部发言人华春莹在2日例行记者会上回应称，希沙姆丁外长用中文表达自己的心声，我看到王毅国务委员向他竖起了大拇指，同时说，我们是兄弟。我想，这段很温暖的互动，让我们隔着屏幕都能感受到中马之间的友好和热烈，这也是中马全面战略伙伴关系的一个生动的写照。————Please subscribe to the SMG Official TV Channel! 欢迎订阅SMG上海电视台官方频道】
★东方卫视《环球交叉点》，上海广播电视台二十年打造的国际新闻优质品牌。
站内热门：
1、【白宫義见】白宫记者团百年来首位华文记者，零距离解读美国政治
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAyEv1wrVt_PRnbIfUo7wT6Xpi8zNOSTK
2、【环球叶问】美女评论员章一叶，从政治学、社会学、传播学等视角，解读国际热点。
shorturl.at/orAFP
3、【砚青吃瓜】美女评论员陈砚青，以国际关系和新闻专业主义，高举吃瓜旗帜，解构国际热点故事
shorturl.at/mnpLP
4、【环球数说】美女评论员娄佳，带你看数字呈现的新闻，还有数字背后的新闻，有点儿意思
shorturl.at/uBD39
5、【东瀛一周蒋】资深媒体人蒋丰，在日本聊日本，“精致”解读日本政治生活
shorturl.at/xMSW0
6、【大咖说】中国顶尖国际关系学者的真知灼见。牛掰是有道理的
shorturl.at/tFL39
7、【交叉点评】追热点、涨知识，看了不后悔
shorturl.at/tER16
8、【环球交叉点】40分钟国际时政深度访谈，顶级水准、干货满满
shorturl.at/mBDVY

shorturl.at/mpv04

snippet.title: 【正常發揮PiMW】民進黨「膝蓋軟了」 竟「幫中共洗白」?還譚德賽.韓國瑜公道背後…台灣恐「付出代價」…@正常發揮   20210329 完整版
snippet.description:
正常發揮 是個{不正常}的政論節目

我們評論政治 更愛挖掘內幕
我們監督時政 更愛嘲弄政客

我們罵人不帶髒 糗人沒在怕

犀利也好 幽默也罷
難搞也行 有種最大

我們的苛薄不太正常
我們的尖酸直戳心臟 

國內 國外 政治 社會

誰敢不正常 我們就上膛

正常發揮主旨無他

就盼台灣正常 世界正常
你的盼望 我來喉舌
你的正常 我來發揮

#王又正 #正常發揮

snippet.title: Social Media Toxicity (Ft. Annette Lee) - Real Talk Season 2 Episode 18
snippet.description:
Is social media ruining our lives?

In this episode, the cast talks about the good, the bad and the ugly of going online, and try to figure out how we can use our #DataForGood.


-
This episode is in collaboration with GOMO by Singtel:
What if we all went online more often with a singular purpose - to do good?

Together, we could fill the world with posts and podcasts that spark joy, along with live streams and live donations that spread the love.
So join the GOMO fam and arm yourself with more data (Lots of data starting from as low as $20!!!) to do good.

Every month, there's a bit of unused data that comes from the GOMO fam. Instead of letting it go to waste, GOMO wants to give it back to its users!


Starting with World Health Day on the 7th of April, every fam member gets an extra 1GB of data on one special day every month. Be sure to make the most of your data that day! #DataForGood#GOMOForGood

Disclaimer: All views expressed are from the cast.

Subscribe for more content like this: http://bit.ly/SubscribeMOSG 

Catch more Millennial Stories here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTiPyDtowSLTa8zPJKxY5G4Xcfknkabzd

Catch more Real Talk episodes here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTiPyDtowSLS_oGC6b8MuUfNjynhZnA4i

Catch more couple features here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTiPyDtowSLTlb-r5l84sIWDJtUabQrS_

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜競馬Fact Check Live 直播2021-03-28 十場HKJC香港賽馬會沙田草地日馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬 | 蘋果日報 Apple Daily
snippet.description:
這天（28日）沙田馬場上演十場草地日賽，頭場定於下午1時正開跑。

沈集成近15次沙田賽事13次有馬贏，其中近三次皆與潘頓合作贏馬。今次二人合作兩駒，且看能否延續勝勢。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

《競馬Fact Check》提供AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，將有出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》設有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於中午12時25分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》都會全程直播。

蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com
即 like 蘋果 fb  ： http://www.facebook.com/hk.nextmedia
iPhone App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-iPhone
Android App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-Android
=======

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“You really find out who’s there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.”
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato’s new song, “Dancing With The Devil”: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

pt-BR.title: retomando o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Você só descobre com quem pode contar quando você fica sem chão.”
Demi entra na clínica de recuperação e começa seu tratamento, enfrentando alguns problemas no caminho. Ao voltar aos palcos pela primeira vez após a overdose, ela precisa encontrar equilíbrio em sua vida.”

Recursos:
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

fr.title: Reprendre le contrôle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"On découvre ceux qui sont là pour nous quand le monde se dérobe sous nos pieds."

Demi va en cure de désintoxication et emprunte la voie de la guérison, non sans obstacles. Alors qu'elle s'apprête à retrouver la scène pour la première fois après son overdose, elle doit trouver un équilibre dans sa vie.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
  
Pour en savoir plus sur la santé mentale, rendez-vous sur Hope for the Day à hftd.org.
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Kau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.”
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Untuk pendidikan kesehatan mental dan sumber kunjungi Hope for the Day di hftd.org

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

de.title: Die Kontrolle zurückgewinnen : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
“Man erkennt wirklich, wer zu einem steht, wenn einem die Welt unter den Füßen wegbricht.“
Demi macht einen Entzug und beginnt ihren Genesungsweg, allerdings mit Hindernissen. Als sie zum ersten Mal nach ihrer Überdosis wieder auf der Bühne steht, muss sie Balance in ihrem Leben finden.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Für Informationen und Quellen zu psychischer Gesundheit besuchen Sie Hope for the Day auf hftd.org

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

es-419.title: retomando el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Descubres realmente con quién puedes contar cuando el mundo se te cae encima".
Demi va a rehabilitación y comienza a recuperarse, pero se encuentra con obstáculos en el camino. Al volver a los escenarios por primera vez desde su sobredosis, necesita encontrar el equilibrio en su vida.
Recursos:

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Línea directa nacional para agresiones sexuales
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Para obtener información y recursos sobre salud mental, visita Hope for the Day en hftd.org

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

ko.title: 힘 되찾기 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"모든 게 잘못되면 누가 진정한 친구인지 알게 돼요"
데미는 재활 시설에 가서 회복의 여정을 시작하지만, 걸림돌을 만난다. 약물 과다 복용 이후 처음으로 무대 위로 돌아온 데미는 자신의 인생에서 균형을 찾아야 한다.

도움받을 곳:

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

전국 성폭력 핫라인
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

정신 건강 교육과 자원은 Hope For The Day의 hftd.org에서 확인하세요.

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

en.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
“You really find out who’s there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.”
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato’s new song, “Dancing With The Devil”: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: 廖啟智不敵胃癌病逝終年67歲 曾兩奪金像獎最佳男配角
snippet.description:
資深演員廖啟智逝世，終年67歲。廖啟智入行超過40年，以實力派演員見稱，參演過多部影視作品，更曾兩奪金像獎最佳男配角。人稱「智叔」的廖啟智近日傳出患上胃癌的消息，陳敏兒日前接受《東張西望》訪問時，證實有關消息。他所屬公司晚上在社交媒體貼出公告，指廖啟智晚上八時半左右，在家人陪伴下，於威爾斯親王醫院離世。(此片段來自無綫新聞報導)

localized.title: 廖啟智不敵胃癌病逝終年67歲 曾兩奪金像獎最佳男配角
localized.description:
資深演員廖啟智逝世，終年67歲。廖啟智入行超過40年，以實力派演員見稱，參演過多部影視作品，更曾兩奪金像獎最佳男配角。人稱「智叔」的廖啟智近日傳出患上胃癌的消息，陳敏兒日前接受《東張西望》訪問時，證實有關消息。他所屬公司晚上在社交媒體貼出公告，指廖啟智晚上八時半左右，在家人陪伴下，於威爾斯親王醫院離世。(此片段來自無綫新聞報導)

snippet.title: Taylor Swift ft. Maren Morris - You All Over Me (From The Vault) (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for “You All Over Me” (Feat. Maren Morris) (Taylor’s Version) [From The Vault] – off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor’s Version) album. Pre-order the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: http://taylor.lnk.to/yaom
►Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 

►Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store
►Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift 
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift 
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13 
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com 
►Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation 
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com 
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
Official Lyrics:

Once the last drop of rain has dried off the pavement
Shouldn't I find a stain, but I never do
The way the tires turn stones, on old county roads
They leave ‘em muddy underneath 
Reminds me of you
You find graffiti on the walls of old bathroom stalls
You know, you can scratch it right off 
It's how it used to be
But like the dollar in your pocket that's been spent and traded in
You can't change where it's been
Reminds me of me

I lived, and I learned
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I’ve still got you all over me

The best and worst day of June
Was the one that I met you
With your hands in your pockets
And your ‘don't you wish you had me’ grin
But I did, so I smiled, and I melted like a child
Now every breath of air I breathe reminds me of then

And I lived, and I learned 
Had you, got burned
Held out, and held on
God knows, too long
And wasted time, lost tears 
Swore that I'd get out of here
But no amount of freedom gets you clean
I’ve still got you all over me

I lived, and I learned 
And found out what it was to turn around
And see, that we 
Were never really meant to be
So I lied, and I cried 
And I watched a part of myself die
Cause no amount of freedom gets you clean
I’ve still got you all over me
I’ve still got you all over me
Still got you all over me
#taylorswift #youalloverme #marenmorris #fearlesstaylorsversion

Music video by Taylor Swift performing You All Over Me (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video). © 2021 Taylor Swift

http://vevo.ly/YkrN0X

snippet.description:
🎥 SECOND CHANNEL!!! MORE BEFRS » http://bit.ly/2pQYjvM​      
👕  NOSE TO TAIL MERCH! GET YOURS TODAY » https://bit.ly/ShopBEFRS 
💗 SUPPORT OUR MISSION» http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon    

Like our music? Enjoy a free 30-day of Epidemic Sound for the best royalty free music: http://share.epidemicsound.com/BEFRS 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
TASMANIAN CRAB

1. CALISA FOODS 
ADDRESS: 538 Võ Văn Kiệt Street, Cầu Kho Ward, District 1
 
🦀 WHOLE TASMANIAN CRAB
💸PRICE: 17.850.000VND / $777.36 USD 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
2. FUME - JAPANESE FUSION CUISINE 
ADDRESS: 74/7L Hai Bà Trưng Street, Bến Nghé Ward, District 1
SOCIAL: http://bit.ly/FumeSaigon
 
🦀 BOILED CRAB CLAW: Break the shell out of the claw. Serve it on a plate with lemon, spicy radish and ponzu sauce (made from soybean, cooking sake and mirin). 
 
🦀 CRAB MEAT SUSHI: Use the crab leg meat. Place a sheet of seaweed flat down a table. Add rice, wasabi, crab meat, salmon roe and homemade sweet soy sauce. Fold and serve.
 
🦀 GRILLED CRAB MEAT ON CHARCOAL WITH HOKKAIDO RICE: Wrap the half the body of the crab in foil and grill on charcoal. Remove the meat out of the shell and mix them with Hokkaido rice and scallion.
 
🦀 GRILLED CRAB BRAIN AND MEAT: Filter the crab brain out. Take the crab meat out of the remaining claws. Wash the shell. Put the crab meat in the shell. Add the crab brain and mix. Grill the whole thing on a charcoal stove for 6 minutes. Garnish with scallions and julienned dried red chillies.
 
#BestEverSaigonTour #BestEverFoodReviewShow #BEFRS
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
💬COME SAY HI:
INSTAGRAM » http://bit.ly/BestEverInstagram (@besteverfoodreviewshow)
FACEBOOK » http://bit.ly/BEFRSFacebook
 
💗SUPPORT OUR MISSION:
Patreon is a platform that allows people to support creators on a recurring basis. Your contribution is an investment in the creative freedom of my channel and enables me to keep my content authentic and uninterrupted. Your generous donation allows me the time and resources to create more videos for you. We also have some pretty sweet rewards, exclusive to Patreon Bestys. » http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon

Our VIP Patrons: Ryan Rhodes, Paul Citulski, Matthew Holden, David Baliles, Jackson Li, John Logan and Summer & Grayson. 
 
🥒 ABOUT BEFRS:
Hey, I’m Sonny! I’m from the US but currently call Vietnam home. I’ve been living in Asia for 10 years and started making food and travel videos to document my experiences. I travel to different parts of the world, hunting down and documenting the most unique food each country has to offer. 

If you see any factual food errors in my videos, please feel free to politely let me know in the comments. I'm a huge fan of trying different, interesting foods in each country. My show is from a Western point of view, but more importantly, MY point of view. It is not meant to offend any person or culture. 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

CAMERA OPERATOR » Nguyễn Minh Đức
VIDEO EDITOR » Dương Quốc Huy

snippet.title: 為歌而讚【透明】- G.E.M.鄧紫棋
snippet.description:
《透明》
作曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋
作詞：G.E.M.鄧紫棋

愛著你  也愛著我
這是一種折磨  這是一種折磨

今夜無數的街燈  沿路陪著我 
卻把我孤獨的裂縫  照得更寂寞
如果這是一個夢  注定沒結果
那就讓它是個夢  醒來就解脫

是否月光太煽情  讓我突然變得感性
孤掌難鳴  我孤身卻難以安靜
睜開眼睛  我們的路無法看清
想閉上眼睛  把一切暫停

當我的世界出現了你  出現了你
我看著自己變得透明  變得透明
怪我對你太執迷
讓我變得不像自己

在想念你的寂寞夜裡  寂寞夜裡
我想把自己變得透明  變得透明
想把你忘得乾淨
我的心卻被你佔領 

感覺我遇上你  就像綿羊遇上獅子
我徘徊在愛你  還是愛自己的十字
在應該赤裸的時候戴著面具
我對你說的是我聽不明白的言語

你是太陽  我的星光  顯得多黯淡
你是海洋  你的輕狂  我無從反抗
我越來越擅長  對自己說謊
我想要你的綻放  就把我埋葬

當我的世界出現了你  出現了你
我看著自己變得透明  變得透明
怪我對你太執迷
讓我變得不像自己

在想念你的寂寞夜裡  寂寞夜裡
我想把自己變得透明  變得透明
想把你忘得乾淨
我的心卻被你佔領 

愛著你  也愛著我
這是一種折磨  這是一種折磨
難道愛著你  就要忘了我
這是一種折磨  這是一種折磨

當我的世界出現了你  出現了你
我看著自己變得透明  變得透明
怪我對你太執迷
讓我變得不像自己

在想念你的寂寞夜裡  寂寞夜裡
我想把自己變得透明  變得透明
想把你忘得乾淨
我的心卻被你佔領 

愛著你   這是一種折磨 折磨

https://www.youtube.com/gem0816​

我越來越擅長  對自己說謊
我想要你的綻放  就把我埋葬

snippet.title: Little progress made in freeing massive ship stuck in Suez Canal
snippet.description:
The Ever Given, the massive ship stuck in the Suez Canal, is still not freed and may not be for weeks even as crews work around the clock to free it. Elizabeth Palmer has more.

snippet.title: John Takes His Dad For Vaccination | Real Talk Extras
snippet.description:
John's dad, Jack, is eligible for the COVID-19 vaccine, but there's a massive hurdle: he's afraid of needles.

In this episode of Real Talk Extras, join John and Jack to find out more about the actual vaccination process and see whether he makes it through.
